label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 15

extraction.one_line_summary: COSTA Rui won a three-up sprint after psychological warfare with BUTRAGO and KEMNA, while EVENEPOEL's breakaway gambit drained him before the final climb.
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL forced early breakaway selection by attacking for KOM points, but isolated himself before final climb.
JUMBO-VISMA aggressively chased SOLER specifically while allowing other 24-rider breaks, revealing threat assessment hierarchy.
VENDRAME and DENZ marked too dangerous for GC teams despite stage profile, showing team classification concerns.
COSTA deliberately created arguments with BUTRAGO and KEMNA on final climb to disrupt cooperation, won psychological battle.

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: looked short on resources in final kilometers after driving early break, suggesting King of Mountains focus draining GC form
rider_signals.KEMNA Lenny: positive: bridged solo to leaders after crash shows unexpected climbing resilience for BORA domestique
rider_signals.DENZ Nico: neutral: marked out of break by GC teams despite being no overall threat, indicating teams fear DSM breakaway specialists
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: crashed again with burst gels in pocket suggests ongoing bike handling issues compounding fatigue
